title: EB has update, CC on the latest - Earbuds can be updated and popup for Charge Chase will NOT be displayed
scenario: Charge Chase popup card incorrectly displayed on Device Home Screen after earbuds firmware update via app
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly earbuds (EB) have a firmware update available.
2. Ensure the Charge Chase (CC) is on the latest firmware version.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. On the Home screen, initiate the firmware update for the earbuds.
5. Wait for the earbuds firmware update to complete successfully.
6. Observe the Device Home Screen after the update.
expected: After successfully updating the earbuds, the Charge Chase popup card should NOT be displayed on the Device Home Screen.
